response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Stripe. However, the resume shows limited explicit experience with the core GenAI stack required for this role — no clear track record building production AI systems, RAG pipelines, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks. Python is not listed in skills, which is a notable gap for a GenAI-focused Staff FDE position. Worth a screening conversation to probe depth of recent AI/agentic work.
strengths: Staff-level breadth: 15+ years shipping production systems across full stack, with TypeScript/Node.js and cloud (AWS CDK) experience
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at Stripe
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring: workshops, courses, talks, and open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: No Python listed in skills despite being a primary required language for the role
No explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
AI/GenAI exposure appears recent and narrow (MCP tooling); lacks the 8+ years of AI-driven solution development the role requires

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow work at Stripe
Python not in stated skill set
